description: GA for Hadamard construction with circulant cores. Encode four 167-bit chromosomes representing SDS blocks. FFT-based fitness evaluation. GPU-parallelized.
mathematical_formalization: Chromosome: (x_0,...,x_3) in {0,1}^{4x167}. Fitness: f = -sum_{g=1}^{166} (sum_i N_{X_i}(g) - lambda)^2. Target: f = 0.
implementation_hypothesis: Tournament selection, uniform crossover, bit-flip mutation. FFT-based autocorrelation O(v log v). Pop: 10K, Gen: 100K. Cyclotomic seeding.
experiment_seed: GA with FFT fitness on GPU for 24h. Compare random vs cyclotomic vs Williamson-symmetric initialization.
